channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘I feel the clock ticking’: My wife and I are in our 60s — and employ 48 people in a small town. Can we ever retire?
item.description: “We could survive financially, but my people would not.”

item.title: Morgan Stanley just poured through 3,600 stocks and says these are the best opportunities from the AI shakeout
item.description: Morgan Stanley strategists offer criteria on how to find the AI winners, saying the market is starting to demand proof of return on equity.

item.title: Taking the new Wegovy pill every day is really complicated. Will patients stick with it?
item.description: ‘It’s not an easy pill to take’: The first highly anticipated GLP-1 pill is here, but physicians aren’t sure it has the staying power of the injection...

item.title: These brain exercises could cut your dementia risk by 20% over 20 years
item.description: We’re winning the fight against dementia, one battle at a time.

item.title: Gold and silver are rallying again ahead of payrolls report
item.description: Gold and silver futures each rallied on Wednesday, with investors assessing the likelihood of Federal Reserve rate cuts as well as geopolitical tensio...

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...
